pages.text: Before enrichment, raw Uranium must be converted into a gaseous form. $(br2)1. Yellowcake + Nitric Acid -> Uranyl Nitrate.$(br)2. Uranyl Nitrate -> Uranium Dioxide (UO2).$(br)3. UO2 + HF Acid -> Uranium Tetrafluoride (UF4).$(br)4. UF4 + Fluorine Gas -> Uranium Hexafluoride (UF6).
The Chemical Converter handles all these conversion steps. It requires various fluid inputs like Nitric Acid, HF, and Fluorine Gas.
Producing UF4 as a solid intermediate.
Final conversion to UF6 gas for enrichment.
